tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: It is the Hindu festival of lights, when people light rows of small oil lamps called diyas.
It takes place in Brazil and is famous for its huge street parties in the days before Lent.
Families clean their homes to sweep away bad luck and set off fireworks at the start of the lunar new year.
Samba schools parade through Rio de Janeiro in bright, sparkling costumes.
Hindus exchange boxes of sweets to celebrate the victory of light over darkness.
Dancers wearing tall feathered headdresses move through the streets to loud drumming.
Older relatives give children money tucked inside small red envelopes for good luck.
It is one of the most important holidays in India and is also called Deepavali.
A long cloth dragon, held up on poles by many dancers, winds through the streets.
Visitors carve scary faces into pumpkins and children go door to door asking for sweets.
People decorate a tall green tree and hang up stockings on the night of 24 December.
Athletes from many countries compete every four years for gold, silver and bronze medals.
